title: Product | Your Product
description: A platform-site starter product page for capabilities, workflows, and feature groups.
heroTitle: Use this page as the product overview
heroText: This route can act as the product page: describe the capability groups, core workflows, and product scope as clearly as possible.

cards.title: Core capability one
cards.text: Use this card for the product feature or workflow that matters most to new visitors.

cards.title: Core capability two
cards.text: Use this space for the second product area or the next most important workflow.

cards.title: Integrations or compatibility
cards.text: Use this area for connected systems, supported environments, or practical implementation detail.

cards.title: Security or operating confidence
cards.text: Reserve this for reliability, security, compliance, or support information that reduces hesitation.
